webJourneys.user_entry_description: Public login route and form entrypoint.
Authenticated dashboard home route and operator runtime surface.
Legacy positions route redirected to canonical runtime positions surface.
Bot-specific runtime monitoring route and legacy runtime helper route.
Dashboard wallets root route redirecting to the canonical wallet list.
Dashboard wallet id route redirecting to the canonical edit route.
Canonical wallet list route with row-only wallet management table and inline API-key status.
Wallet create route using the shared create/edit form and metadata-backed constraints.
Wallet edit route with existing wallet load update delete and paper reset affordances.
Wallet preview route for ledger-backed summary timeline and cashflow inspection.
Authenticated profile route hosting basic security subscription and API-key panels.
Canonical bots route for bot list management and navigation to create edit preview runtime assistant.
Bot create route with wallet-first setup form.
Bot edit route with existing bot and runtime graph context loading.
Bot preview route bridging setup and runtime aggregate visibility.
Canonical strategies list route for strategy browsing deletion import and export navigation.
Strategy create route using the shared strategy form and preset picker.
Strategy edit route with existing strategy load update and active-bot conflict handling.
Strategy id root route that redirects to the canonical edit route.
Canonical market universe list route with universe table and delete navigation actions.
Market universe create route using the shared form and catalog-backed symbol options.
Market universe edit route with existing universe load update and active-bot conflict feedback.
Canonical backtest runs list route.
Backtest create route with strategy market universe range and candle-window configuration.
Backtest run detail route with summary trades raw timeline report and market views.
Authenticated reports dashboard route shell for performance reporting.
Authenticated dashboard logs route shell.
Admin root route redirecting to subscription plan management.
Admin subscription plan management route.
Admin user role and plan assignment route.
Canonical selected-bot assistant configuration route.
Public register route and form entrypoint.
Public landing page that links unauthenticated users toward auth entrypoints.
Bot new alias route for bot creation flow compatibility.
Bot detail alias route bridging bot setup preview and runtime entrypoints.
Offline route for app shell connectivity fallback.
